title: Hero demo auto-plays verification and shows groundedness improvement
description: This verifies that the landing page automatically runs the hero verification demo and ends with supported claims retained, unsupported claims removed, and an improved groundedness result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero verification demo begins playing automatically
Verify supported and unsupported claims are both shown during the demo
Verify the groundedness result improves by the end of the demo

title: Display a live answer in corrected view after asking a question
description: This verifies that submitting a question runs the verification flow and produces a corrected answer that can be reviewed in the grounded view.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Enter a question in the ask form
Submit the question
Verify claim-by-claim verdicts are displayed
Verify a corrected answer is displayed

title: Prefill the dashboard from a landing page question
description: This verifies that a user can submit a question from the landing page and land on the dashboard with the question prefilled and verification running.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a question into the verify-your-own input
Submit the question
Verify the dashboard opens with the question prefilled
Verify verification is running or displayed for the submitted question

title: Submit a landing page question into the live dashboard
description: This verifies that submitting a question from the landing page opens the live dashboard with the question prefilled and the verification process started.
category: Verify your own question from the landing page

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a question into the verification input
Submit the question for verification
Verify the live dashboard opens with the question prefilled
Verify live verification has started

title: Watch the landing hero auto-play its verification demo
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the landing page and see the hero demo automatically play through grounded verification with the groundedness meter and hallucination reduction result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero demo to play
Verify supported and unsupported claims are shown in the hero
Verify the groundedness meter changes and the hallucination reduction result is displayed

title: Change the support threshold and see claims reclassify
description: This verifies that adjusting the calibration threshold immediately changes which claims are treated as supported or unsupported.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select an example chip
Drag the threshold on the calibration rail
Verify claim support classifications update
Verify the groundedness percentage updates

title: Show the verification loading state while a question is processed
description: This verifies that after submitting a question, the interface shows the retrieve, generate, and verify progression before results appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Enter a question in the ask form
Submit the question
Verify a loading state is displayed
Verify the verification pipeline progress is shown

title: Question prefilled from the URL starts verification on the dashboard
description: This verifies that opening the dashboard with a prefilled question automatically loads that question and begins verification.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Verify the dashboard loads a prefilled question
Verify verification begins automatically for the prefilled question

title: Live dashboard shows abstention for an out-of-corpus question
description: This verifies that a user can ask a question outside the provided corpus and receive an abstaining answer instead of a fabricated one.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Fill in an out-of-corpus question into the question field
Submit the question for verification
Verify the dashboard shows an abstaining answer
Verify claim-by-claim verification results are displayed for the submitted question

title: Abstain from answering an out-of-corpus question
description: This verifies that a question outside the available corpus topics returns an abstention instead of a grounded answer.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Enter a question outside the available corpus topics
Submit the question
Verify an abstention message is displayed
Verify no grounded answer is presented

title: Open the live demo dashboard from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the landing page to the interactive live verification dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live demo entry point
Verify the interactive verification dashboard is displayed

title: Threshold changes reclassify claims and update the corrected answer
description: This verifies that adjusting the support threshold changes claim classifications and updates groundedness and the corrected answer in real time.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Open a precomputed example
Adjust the support threshold slider
Verify claim classifications update after the threshold changes
Verify the groundedness result and corrected answer update

title: Load a precomputed example and review the verified result
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the dashboard, choose a precomputed example, and immediately review claim verdicts, support scores, sources, and the corrected answer.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select an example chip
Verify claim-by-claim verification results are displayed
Verify a corrected answer is displayed

title: Switch to corrected answer view
description: This verifies that a user can switch to the cleaned-up answer view and see only the grounded response content.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Switch to the corrected answer view
Verify the corrected answer is displayed
Verify unsupported content is not shown in the answer

title: Switch to annotated answer view
description: This verifies that a user can switch to the annotated view and see unsupported text struck through while the rest of the answer remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Switch to the annotated answer view
Verify the annotated answer is displayed
Verify unsupported content is shown inline in the answer

title: Load a precomputed example from the landing page
description: This verifies that selecting an example prompt on the landing page opens the dashboard with an example loaded and ready to inspect.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose an example prompt chip
Verify the live dashboard opens with an example loaded
Verify claim-by-claim verification results are displayed

title: See the corrected answer change after threshold adjustment
description: This verifies that changing the calibration threshold updates the corrected answer in response to the new support cutoff.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select an example chip
Drag the threshold on the calibration rail
Verify the corrected answer changes
Verify the updated groundedness result is displayed

title: Precomputed example shows claim verdicts and corrected answer
description: This verifies that a loaded example on the dashboard displays claim verdicts, support scores, evidence, and the corrected answer.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Open a precomputed example
Verify claim verdicts and support scores are displayed
Verify evidence and a corrected answer are displayed

title: Keep the answer hidden until verification completes
description: This verifies that submitting a question does not show final results before the pipeline finishes and the verified output is ready.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Enter a question in the ask form
Submit the question
Verify the final answer is not shown immediately
Verify the loading state is displayed

title: Switch to a different example and see the dashboard refresh
description: This verifies that selecting another example chip updates the dashboard to a new precomputed verification result.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select one example chip
Select a different example chip
Verify the displayed verification result updates to a different example
Verify the displayed claims change

title: Reveal and close a claim's evidence
description: This verifies that a user can open a claim's evidence section, inspect the supporting passage, and close it to continue reviewing.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select an example chip
Open a claim's evidence section
Verify the relevant passage is displayed
Close the claim's evidence section
Verify the evidence passage is hidden

title: Replay restarts the landing page demo animation
description: This verifies that replaying the landing page demo restarts the verification animation from the beginning and runs it again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the replay control for the hero demo
Verify the hero verification animation restarts
Verify the demo reaches a completed verification state again

title: Inspect the support details for a precomputed example
description: This verifies that a loaded example exposes claim-level support scores and retrieved source evidence for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select an example chip
Verify support scores are displayed
Verify source evidence is displayed

title: Retain the corrected answer after switching views
description: This verifies that a user can move between answer views and still return to the grounded corrected version.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Switch to the annotated answer view
Switch back to the corrected answer view
Verify the corrected answer is displayed
Verify unsupported content is not shown in the answer

title: Review a claim after hovering and selecting its marker
description: This verifies that a user can inspect a claim marker, read the claim text, and jump to that claim in the verification view.

steps.description: Navigate to /app
Select an example chip
Hover a claim marker
Verify the claim text is revealed
Select the same claim marker
Verify the verification view jumps to that claim

title: Reduced motion shows a static final hero state
description: This verifies that when reduced motion is enabled, the landing page shows the final verification state statically instead of auto-playing the animation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero verification result is displayed statically
Verify the final groundedness outcome is visible without an active animation
